era: Indie Rock. E=4 -- the measured, contemplative side of 764-HERO. Restraint as method. Second entry (first at 112 electronic). v1.49.337.

location.formative: Capitol Hill indie rock scene. Up Records community. Modest Mouse-adjacent.
location.career: 764-HERO. 1993-2003. Up Records, Kill Rock Stars. Dual identity: electronic and indie rock.

members.name: John Atkins
members.note: Deliberate guitar style. Emotional restraint. Conversational vocals. Up Records core artist.

members.name: Polly Johnson
members.note: Melodic counterpoint. Independent bass voice. Dual-voice interplay with Atkins.

associated_musicians.name: Modest Mouse
associated_musicians.note: Shared scene, shared members, Up Records labelmates.

associated_musicians.name: Built to Spill
associated_musicians.note: Up Records labelmate. Shared aesthetic territory.

theory_nodes.concept: Two-context artist -- 764-HERO at degree 112 (electronic) and degree 196 (indie rock). Not a career-phase split but a simultaneous dual identity. Two sonic worlds from one band.
examples: 196: indie rock context -- guitar, bass, drums, vocals.
theory_nodes.description: Two-context artist. Electronic and indie rock. Dual identity.

genealogy.relationship: 764-HERO at 196. Second entry. Indie rock side of dual identity.

theory_nodes.concept: Up Records aesthetic -- understated, emotionally intelligent, never flashy. 764-HERO, Modest Mouse, Built to Spill. Restraint as shared aesthetic. A label defined by what it holds back.
examples: Up Records: understated, precise, emotionally intelligent.
theory_nodes.description: Up Records aesthetic. Restraint. Precision. Emotional intelligence.

theory_nodes.concept: E=4 measured zone -- between twee E=3 and power-pop E=5. Emotionally present but restrained. The contemplative middle ground where indie rock lives.
theory_nodes.description: E=4 measured zone. Contemplative. Present but restrained.

genealogy.relationship: 764-HERO at 196. E=4 fits the measured aesthetic.

cross_references.relationship: FIRST ENTRY! Electronic context. The other half of the dual identity. 84 degrees earlier.
E=3 to E=4. Twee to indie rock. Both Capitol Hill. Gentle to measured.
E=5 to E=4. Power-pop to restrained indie. Energy settling in the post-hip-hop zone.
Different indie traditions. Punk energy (1979) vs. restrained contemplation (1993). Same city, different approaches.
